modeling_constraints: Do not hard-code validation stimulus, stop times, sample windows, gold internals, or simulator side channels.
problem_statement: the supplied system violates the public contract

properties.observable_contract: On each falling `clk` threshold crossing, sample `dcmpp` to choose the next binary-search direction.
A high decision moves the differential input negative and a low decision moves it positive.
The differential search step halves after each sampled decision.
`vinp` and `vinn` are driven symmetrically around the common-mode level with half differential amplitude on each side.

title: Comparator Offset Driver
